metadata.extractionNote: Automatically extracted with table parsing from the uploaded KSB Domestic Pumps Performance Booklet. Spot-check before production use because some pages have complex multi-table layouts.
metadata.unitRule: Stored internally as LPH. LPM table values were multiplied by 60. m3/hr table values were multiplied by 1000.
